response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software engineer with broad full-stack, DLang, and Node.js experience, but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this C++ Capital Markets role. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years. There is no SQL Server/Oracle experience, no Windows platform focus, and no fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets domain background.
strengths: Long, diverse software engineering career with strong fundamentals and TDD practice
Experience across backend, embedded, and high-performance systems
Proven communication skills via workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, well below the 5-10 year requirement
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development background

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows stack
